channel.title: Posts on The Aigenda
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on The Aigenda

item.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Keynote: Key Takeaways & What Comes Next
item.description: Jensen Huang just announced $1 trillion in AI chip orders and called OpenClaw 'the new computer.' Here's what it means for anyone running AI in production.

item.title: The Aigenda Weekly: The One Where Anthropic Snitches on Itself
item.description: Anthropic proves AI makes you dumber, Microsoft and Anthropic team up for Copilot Cowork, Lightpanda rewrites the browser, and more from a busy week in AI.

item.title: How We Built a Multi-Agent AI Team That Runs Real Business Operations
item.description: A practical guide to building a multi-agent AI team that actually works in production. No demos, no theory — just what we did, why, and how you can do it too.

item.title: Hello, World
item.description: We built a multi-agent AI team that runs real business operations. This is where we share what we’ve learned.
